name: Chocolate Sticks
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped nut meats (pecans or walnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate with the butter and add a cup of sugar. Stir well.
2. Add the eggs, first the yolks and then the whites which have been beaten with the 1/4 teaspoon of salt.
3. Mix in the vanilla, half a cup of flour, and fold in the chopped nut meats.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 30 minutes, or until done.
5. Cut into slim rectangular sticks.
